text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: While I'm walking in the park...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm, the weather's perfect today...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Plop...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That sounded like a koi poking its<n>head out
of the water. Must be<n>hungry.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Carp out of water, in search of foodit wanders: "Carpe diem," I say.Alas, one too many syllables.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse you, Sky! How are you going<n>to get
ready for the race with all this<n>slacking off?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Why hello there, King. I was hoping<n>for some fish
pellets, but oh well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What in the world are you talking<n>about?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Just fish food for thought. Is jogging<n>on the
itinerary today, King? You sure<n>are working hard.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well of course! We've got a race<n>coming up and
you're out here again<n>doing goodness knows
what!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, chillaaax. Haven't you<n>heard of
strategic resting?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Strategic what now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Look at the koi in the pond. Oh how<n>relaxing it
must be to soak up the sun<n>as you swim, eh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But watch this...

text_block_list.name: Pond Keeper
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, my little koi buddies. Time<n>for a snack
break. C'mon, eat!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Plip... Splosh, splish, sploosh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See that? They conserve their energy<n>so that
when the time is right, they can<n>swim real fast.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
When nothing's going on, they're<n>chill as a
cucumber. That must be why<n>the koi is the
"freshwater king."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: King, you say?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yup, king. See what I'm getting at?<n>I'm
strategically resting now to reap<n>the rewards
later.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You catch my drift since you're a king<n>and all,
right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! I know everything there<n>is to know
when it comes to kings!<n>But...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Still on the fence, hm? Well then...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! Yes, you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm talking to you. You've been<n>following
our conversation, right?<n>Don't you agree with
me?
choice_data_list: Tell her that she's just good at making excuses.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See? Now that's a nod with<n>conviction! We
should all strive to rest<n>with the leisurely ease of
kings!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It sounded too good to be true when it<n>was just
you blabbering... But I<n>suppose you must be right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ You should join me like the<n>king you are
and laze abou—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I mean, strategically rest! Justgently close your eyes... That's it...Now take deep breaths...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There, nice and peaceful. Today's<n>weather really
is perfect! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Aha! I almost got caught up in your<n>overly
laid-back ways!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: SKYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoops, this isn't looking good.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You'll have the honor of joining me<n>on my jog!
We leave at once!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But, King—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
LA, LA, LAA! I CAN'T HEAR YOU! Get<n>those legs
moving!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Urk, my words were oil to the flames.<n>The
schemer drowns in her own<n>scheme...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A worked-up King Halo drags Seiun<n>Sky along for
a jog.
